local_dependency_status.next_action: SB-0 through SB-2b completed; Silverbox downgraded to a risk case; proceed to battery ECM semi-real positive-case preparation

sources.name: Nonlinear Benchmark Silverbox
sources.audited_information: Silverbox is an electronic implementation of the Duffing oscillator; the dataset contains V1 input and V2 measured output; cite Wigren and Schoukens ECC 2013.

sources.name: Wigren and Schoukens 2013 ECC
sources.citation: T. Wigren and J. Schoukens. Three free data sets for development and benchmarking in nonlinear system identification. 2013 European Control Conference (ECC), pp. 2933-2938.

sources.name: nonlinear_benchmarks official dataloader
sources.audited_information: The official dataloader supports nonlinear_benchmarks.Silverbox(), returns train_val plus test_multisine, test_arrow_full, and test_arrow_no_extrapolation, with test state_initialization_window_length=50.

modeling_decision.preferred_route: output-error fitting with latent velocity/state initialization
modeling_decision.diagnostic_route: smoothed derivative or integral-form regression after output-state reconstruction
modeling_decision.first_candidate_slot: Duffing-like stiffness p_k(y)=beta0+beta2*y^2 with input u kept in the known forcing term
